intro: Over the twelve days from April 13 to April 24, 2026, ZCyberNews published 17 articles on privilege-escalation threats, a period marked by 15 high-severity incidents, one critical, and one medium. The threat actor Chaotic Eclipse was observed in these campaigns. Key vulnerabilities included CVE-2026-5490, CVE-2026-6406, CVE-2026-25203, CVE-2026-33104, and CVE-2026-34054, affecting sectors such as education, healthcare, technology, digital signage, and enterprise on a global scale.
